summary:

- Clicked the 'BACK TO GUILD' button; the Guildmaster Console (guild screen) is now visible — the page shows the 'Guildmaster Console' title and the 'DEPLOY ARENA' button.

Conclusion: The feature works as expected and all assertions in the task are satisfied. No additional actions will be performed per the user's instruction.
